[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110011111 7
1 111011101 7
2 101000101 4
3 111100111 7
4 110111111 8
5 010110111 6
6 000011110 4
7 100000010 2

01 10 111111111 a
12 21 110111111 8 match 4
23 32 010111111 7
34 43 100011110 5
45 54 110011111 7 match 0
56 65 111011101 7 match 1
67 76 101000101 4 match 2
70 07 111100111 7 match 3

02 20 111110111 8

71 17 110111111 8 match 4
